permits.description: Expand existing single family unit and add another unit in the rear to create a 2-family structure. New structural system, new floors, new mepfp, new finishes. No expansion of basement. Building will be sprinklered.
permits.score_reasons: high cost ($650,000); keyword: structural; minor: sprinkler

llm_assessment.reasoning: A $650,000 gut renovation and conversion from a single-family to a two-family structure by an investment-named contractor indicates a major value-add project typically intended for resale or high-end investment.
